prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: mobile game key art, square splash illustration
Primary request: refined dark-fantasy evolution art for the Vavarda clicker at level 4, title Keeper of Tomes
Scene/background: ruined occult archive with tall stone shelves and broken arches, subtle floating rune pages, less cluttered than before
Subject: central hooded keeper-mage with cleaner silhouette, layered robes, restrained armor trims, one hand controlling a compact violet tome-sigil, the other hand gathering arcane power
Style/medium: premium dark-fantasy mobile game illustration, polished, highly readable at small size, progression-consistent with levels 3 and 5
Composition/framing: centered full figure, square crop, strong silhouette, minimal side clutter, visible chest and hand magic
Lighting/mood: scholarly, secretive, more powerful than level 3 but not yet warlike, elegant and ominous
Color palette: black, silver, dark plum, controlled violet glow
Materials/textures: rune cloth, book dust, occult stone, subtle page fragments
Quality: high
Constraints: no text, no logo, no watermark, no frame, one character only, avoid gold-heavy palette and avoid distracting background shards
